key_insight: STORX is a modular, open-source MATLAB framework that unifies shape and topology optimization methods in one object-oriented environment for learning, experimentation, and reproducible research.
engineering_relevance: It helps engineers and researchers prototype optimization workflows faster by separating model intent from implementation while supporting both design optimization and visualization in a single codebase.
method: Abstract base classes define core interfaces for objectives, sensitivities, and constraints.
Supports parametric and level-set shape optimization plus density, level-set, and topological-sensitivity topology optimization.
Integrates finite element analysis, sensitivity computation, and visualization with extensible derived classes.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports illustrative problems and software architecture demonstrations, but not a quantitative benchmark study or performance comparison.
watch_item: Its MATLAB-centric, educational design may limit scalability and requires careful implementation to maintain consistency across new derived modules.
paper_title: STORX: An Open-Source Object-Oriented Framework for Shape and Topology Optimization in MATLAB
